title: Trial Key Recipe
description: now you can craft your own Trial Key
body:
🗝️ Trial Key Recipe Datapack  
Unlock the challenge—no vault looting required!  
This datapack introduces a custom recipe for the Trial Key, giving players a survival-friendly way to access Trial Chambers in Minecraft 1.21+.

✨ Features  
✅ Shapeless recipe using 1 Tuff + 2 Copper Ingots
🧩 Lore-friendly integration with underground exploration and copper-age progression  
🔁 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.21+
